name: Upload
description: A file upload component with drag-and-drop support, file list display, validation, and custom file item rendering.
usage_guidelines: Use for file uploads in forms.
Set accept to restrict file types.
Set uploadLimit to restrict number of files.
Handle onChange and onFileRemove for file management.

beforeUpload.type: (file: FileList | null, fileList: File[]) => boolean | string
beforeUpload.description: Validation function before upload. Return false or error message to prevent.

customFileItem.type: (props: {file: File, index: number, onRemove: () => void, FileIcon: Component}) => ReactNode

fileListClass.description: CSS classes for file list container.

onChange.description: Callback fired when files are added.

onFileRemove.description: Callback fired when file is removed.

styling_info.visual_description: A clickable upload area with optional drag-and-drop zone. Shows file list below with remove buttons. Draggable variant has dashed border that highlights on drag-over.

Do: Show upload progress for large files
